en: Why is everyone staring at me?
Me lo fondo.
Mis chemiación, misión poner.
Un exorodo casual.
See, Amy? Fun thing about working cases.
ko: 봐, 에이미? 사건을 다루는 재미있는 점이야.

en: You meet people from all over the world.
ko: 전 세계의 사람들을 만날 수 있어.

en: Okay, basal body temperature is optimal. Let's do this quickly.
ko: 알겠어, 기초 체온이 최적이야. 빨리 하자.

en: Oh, Amy, I'm not some faucet you can just turn on and off.
ko: 아, 에이미, 난 그냥 켜고 끌 수 있는 수도꼭지가 아니야.

en: You got to romance me., Faucet's on.
Let's, uh, I'm gonna call Holt.
You want to come? Yeah. Too bad you're not invited. I'm in charge.
ko: 같이 갈래? 응. 안타깝게도 너는 초대받지 못했어. 내가 책임져.

en: Bye!
I've been chasing this guy for three months.
I've got him dead to rights.
Fingerprints, witnesses, it's in the bag.
So I'm just gonna grab a healthy breakfast.
ko: 그래서 건강한 아침을 먹으러 갈 거야.

en: Are those gummy bears wrapped in a food roller?
Breakfast burrito, but, yeah. I pity your dentist.
ko: 아침 부리토, 하지만 그래. 네 치과 의사가 불쌍해.

en: Ah, joke's on you. I don't have a dentist.
ko: 아, 너가 잘못 생각했어. 난 치과 의사가 없어.

en: Then we figured out how to be good parents. TV and cake.
ko: 그때 우리는 좋은 부모가 되는 방법을 알아냈어. TV와 케이크.

en: TV and cake were my parents.
It's okay.
Come with me, Amy, to the dumpster.
Me and Amy going diving in the dumpster.
